about.description: The East Java Super Corridor (EJSC) is a service provider for the Provincial Government and Vertical institutions (Government Super Corridor) and serves as an open collaboration platform for communities and MSMEs to connect and collaborate (Community Super Corridor) for the people of Malang and its surroundings.
about.coworking_desc: Co-Working Space is primarily used for workspaces, webinars, workshops, and other training activities.
about.note_visitor: *Every visitor to EJSC Bakorwil Malang is required to fill out the visitor register form.
about.guidelines_desc: Welcome! To ensure a productive and comfortable environment for everyone, please follow these procedures and regulations:
about.proc_1_desc: Please sign in by scanning the provided QR code or using the designated visitor computer.
about.proc_2_desc: You may request the Wi-Fi password at the Customer Service (CS) desk.
about.proc_3_desc: Feel free to occupy any available workspace (available on a first-come, first-served basis).
about.note_desc: Your cooperation helps us maintain a vibrant and focused creative community. Enjoy your time at EJSC!
video.desc: Take a closer look at our collaborative spaces, facilities, and the vibrant community that brings ideas to life.
cta.title:
Ready to Level Up
Your Productivity?
cta.desc: Register as a visitor or book your favorite room right now.
footer.desc: We explore every idea with curiosity and care, always looking for better ways to solve problems. Open minds for creative solutions within our collaborative workspace.
footer.email_desc:
Feel free to email us for any
collaborative inquiries.
workspace_detail.title: Workspace Detail
workspace_detail.no_desc: No description available for this workspace.
workspace_detail.no_history: No booking history found for this workspace.
talenta.desc: EJSC Talent refers to creative individuals, freelancers, and professionals in the Bakorwil III Malang work area who have joined the East Java Super Corridor ecosystem. They are ready to collaborate to advance East Java's digital economy and creative industry.
talenta.step1_desc: Fill out the form with your personal data, skills, and upload required documents (KTP, CV & portfolio).
talenta.step2_desc: The EJSC team will review your data and portfolio to assess your qualifications.
talenta.step3_desc: Approved talents will be listed in the EJSC database and may receive project or collaboration opportunities.
talenta.no_match: We couldn't find any talent matching
talenta.try_different: Try a different name or city.
talenta.empty_talents: No talents found. Be the first to join!
umkm.desc: EJSC Partner SMEs are micro, small, and medium enterprises in the Bakorwil III Malang work area that have been curated and fostered by the East Java Super Corridor team. We help facilitate legality, branding, and digital market access to encourage the growth of local products.
umkm.step1_desc: Fill out the form with your business data, owner information, and upload required documents (KTP & product photos).
umkm.step2_desc: The EJSC team will review your business data, products, and selected facilitation needs.
umkm.step3_desc: Selected SMEs will receive support and opportunities for product development and promotion through EJSC programs.
umkm.no_match: We couldn't find any SME matching
achievement.title: Our Achievements
achievement.desc: A collection of milestones, awards, and recognitions earned through the dedication and hard work of the East Java Super Corridor (EJSC) team in fostering innovation and collaboration.
achievement.empty: No accomplishments recorded yet. We're still building our track record!
achievement.grow_desc: We're committed to creating more impact. Join our collaborative space to foster your ideas, talents, and business potential.
